title: Transformers and Evangelion to cross over
display_title: Transformers and Evangelion to cross over
wikitext:
[]: Transformers and Evangelion to cross over.             Quote Post by Darkwing » Thu Apr 24, 2014 8:22 pm No really. https://twitter.com/yozakana_1/status/459297518384201728/photo/1 So far it just looks like the MP 10 Optimus Prime is getting released in Unit-01's colors, but still who ever saw this coming?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Apr 24, 2014 8:23 pm I'm still confused by this, but I guess I'm also surprised this crossover didn't happen sooner. ANN article here: http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/interest/2014-04-24/takara-tomy-planning-transformers-x-evangelion-crossover

[]:             Quote Post by Darkwing » Thu Apr 24, 2014 8:46 pm Huh, so there is some story. Not much, but hey, Sky-Lynx! He seems to be getting some love lately. Anyways Optimus Prime can give Shinji a much needed positive role model.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Thu Apr 24, 2014 8:52 pm Shinji, get in the fucking robot...which is now a truck...

[]:             Quote Post by heavytread » Thu Apr 24, 2014 9:08 pm So basically Eva 01-imus? And this is a repaint of mp-10? Ya I think this is a good idea. The story for this is interesting . I don't think Shinji will be getting in the robot any time soon though...

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Thu Apr 24, 2014 10:22 pm Saw this on IG earlier but the story didn't break for several hours later. Being a G1 fan and considering all other Transformers incarnations since to be meh since that's what I grew up with, I'm stoked about this. Optimus decked out in an Eva-01 color scheme, I'm definitely up for that. No mention of the Decepticons but Megatron can't be far behind in finding a way to collaborate with or manipulate the Angels. The VF-01 doesn't belong in this context, but eh.

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Thu Apr 24, 2014 10:26 pm Unit-02 should be Hot Rod and Unit-00 should be Bumble Bee.

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Fri Apr 25, 2014 12:05 am Hey, as long as that Misogynist Michael Bay as far away as physically possible, I'm good.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Fri Apr 25, 2014 12:18 am This news arouses me physically.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Apr 25, 2014 1:07 am "Why girl hit grimlock's nose?" "Because you looked at my panties, idiot!"

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Fri Apr 25, 2014 1:08 am NemZ wrote: "Why girl hit grimlock's nose?" "Because you looked at my panties, idiot!"

[]:             Quote Post by Mizerous » Fri Apr 25, 2014 1:13 am So will this be an anime or just a comic?

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Fri Apr 25, 2014 1:15 am Mizerous wrote: So will this be an anime or just a comic?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Apr 25, 2014 1:21 am "Pokapoka: Agreeable." "Wondergirl, stop talking like that boxy weirdo." "Negative." "Seriously, it's weirding everyone out. Even more than usual." "Rumble: Eject. Mission: Pest removal" [insert transformer noise] "Mein Gott, You're keeping them in your BRA now?!" "Hey, her chest compartment's way comfier than Soundwave's. I ain't complainin."

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Fri Apr 25, 2014 8:21 am I read this just now. I was like, "the fuck they did to my childhood again?"

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Fri Apr 25, 2014 8:25 am So one of my fav childhood cartoons is teaming up with my fav cartoon of my adult life?.... What can I say other than I want that Eva-Prime!

[]:             Quote Post by Black Swordsman » Fri Apr 25, 2014 4:04 pm Ray wrote: Hey, as long as that Misogynist Michael Bay as far away as physically possible, I'm good.

[]:             Quote Post by Darkwing » Fri Apr 25, 2014 8:19 pm NemZ wrote: "Why girl hit grimlock's nose?" "Because you looked at my panties, idiot!"

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Apr 25, 2014 8:22 pm I won't be satisfied unless I see Unicron eating Giant Naked Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by KingXanaduu » Fri Apr 25, 2014 9:12 pm Crossover Pic: SPOILER: Show
